name: Australian Songlines
desc: Aboriginal songline network across Australia — artistic rendering from the Musée du quai Branly exhibition. The songlines maintain chronon flow between the Wharton Basin and Loyalty Islands vortex nodes, a living riftline maintenance practice continuous for 65,000+ years. The meandering corridor running east-west across the centre corresponds directly to the icosahedral edge between nodes 4 and 5.
